steps.title: Issue a manager-dashboard session URL with `bun run issue:dashboard-session`
Open the issued manager-dashboard session URL in `agent-browser` and verify the public dashboard loads correctly
Navigate to a screen that displays something that was modified; if there were no UI changes, go to chat
Post a screenshot into the chat as a markdown image from `~/temp`
What is the screenshot verification outcome?

decision.prompt: What is the screenshot verification outcome?

steps.title: Roll back to an earlier known-good release tag
Continue manager-dashboard screenshot verification until a stable working release is found
Delete the failed release tag locally and on the remote after recovery
